formula: age = a + b * ln(dbh_cm) + c * ln(height_m) + d * ln(dbh_cm) * ln(height_m)
notes: Model calibrated on Warsaw streetside trees, age 10-85 years. All inputs are natural log. DBH in centimeters, height in meters. R² values: Tilia 0.931, Fraxinus 0.916, Aesculus 0.895. A +5 year nursery offset was built into the original model calibration. Mean bias < ±15%.
